utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 6 named fields. Check full specification: 1) destination: provided (Lisbon, Portugal). 2) travel_dates: specific dates provided. 3) transportation: has details and a single total cost, but lacks specific flight details (airline name beyond 'Budget Airline', flight numbers, times). However, the format only requires 'flight details with costs'—the provided description qualifies as basic details with a cost, so acceptable. 4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs—hotel named and cost provided, acceptable. 5) activities: selected activities with costs—only one activity listed with cost; meets requirement though minimal. 6) additional_services: 'None' with cost—acceptable. 7) total_budget: provided as a total, but not a 'complete cost breakdown' beyond line items; since individual line items and their costs are present and sum to total, this constitutes a breakdown. Conclusion: all 6/6 items are included and sufficiently specified per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final package: destination is Lisbon, Portugal; transportation is Budget Airline, Economy Class; accommodation is Cityscape Hotel; activity is City Walking Tour; no additional services. Map each to the ground-truth ratings: Lisbon, Portugal (destinations) rating 4; Budget Airline, Economy Class (transportation -> budget_airlines -> Economy Class) rating 2; Cityscape Hotel (accommodation) rating 7; City Walking Tour (activities) rating 9.
